") center/cover;
    }
    .progress-layout{
      position:relative;z-index:1;
      display:grid;
      grid-template-columns:minmax(0,2.35fr) minmax(270px,.75fr);
      gap:28px;
      min-height:530px;
      margin-top:36px;
    }
    .curve-canvas{
      position:relative;
      min-height:520px;
      padding:34px 28px 26px;
      overflow:hidden;
      border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.18);
      border-radius:31px;
      background:
        radial-gradient(circle at 20% 80%,rgba(132,160,135,.14),transparent 28%),
        linear-gradient(145deg,rgba(255,255,255,.1),rgba(255,255,255,.035));
      backdrop-filter:blur(20px);
    }
    .curve-canvas:before{
      content:"";
      position:absolute;inset:18px;
      border:1px solid rgba(220,195,150,.08);
      border-radius:24px;
      pointer-events:none;
    }
    .curve-canvas h3{
      position:relative;z-index:2;
      margin:0;
      color:#d9d0c3;
      font-size:9px;font-weight:500;letter-spacing:.24em;
    }
    .memory-svg{
      position:absolute;
      left:4%;right:4%;bottom:12%;
      width:92%;height:74%;
      overflow:visible;
    }
    .memory-ghost{
      fill:none;stroke:rgba(255,255,255,.08);stroke-width:7;
      stroke-linecap:round;
    }
    .memory-path{
      fill:none;
      stroke:url(#memoryGradient);
      stroke-width:2.1;
      stroke-linecap:round;
      filter:drop-shadow(0 0 7px rgba(204,174,121,.28));
      transition:stroke-dashoffset 1.4s var(--ease);
    }
    .memory-trace{
      fill:none;stroke:rgba(234,207,155,.23);stroke-width:.8;stroke-dasharray:3 10;
      animation:traceMove 8s linear infinite;
    }
    @keyframes traceMove{to{stroke-dashoffset:-130}}
    .curve-nodes{
      position:absolute;inset:0;
      pointer-events:none;
    }
    .curve-node{
      --x:10%;--y:75%;
      position:absolute;left:var(--x);top:var(--y);
      width:18px;height:18px;border-radius:50%;
      border:1px solid rgba(240,226,203,.75);
      background:#28251f;
      transform:translate(-50%,-50%);
      box-shadow:0 0 0 8px rgba(255,255,255,.035);
      pointer-events:auto;
      transition:.5s var(--ease);
    }
    .curve-node:before{
      content:"";position:absolute;inset:-11px;border:1px solid rgba(212,173,107,.16);border-radius:50%;
      animation:nodeBreathe 2.8s ease-in-out infinite;
    }
    .curve-node.done{
      background:var(--gold-soft);
      border-color:#fff0ce;
      box-shadow:0 0 0 8px rgba(209,171,104,.09),0 0 24px rgba(212,175,109,.38);
    }
    .curve-node:hover{transform:translate(-50%,-50%) scale(1.35)}
    @keyframes nodeBreathe{50%{transform:scale(1.35);opacity:0}}
    .curve-label{
      --x:10%;--y:80%;
      position:absolute;left:var(--x);top:var(--y);
      transform:translateX(-50%);
      text-align:center;
      color:#e7dfd3;
      font:italic 18px var(--serif);
      pointer-events:none;
    }
    .curve-label small{display:block;margin-top:4px;color:#8f887e;font:7px var(--sans);letter-spacing:.18em}
    .progress-ledger{
      display:flex;flex-direction:column;
      border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.18);
      border-radius:31px;
      background:linear-gradient(170deg,rgba(255,255,255,.11),rgba(255,255,255,.045));
      backdrop-filter:blur(20px);
      overflow:hidden;
    }
    .ledger-block{
      flex:1;min-height:140px;
      display:flex;flex-direction:column;justify-content:center;
      padding:28px;
      border-bottom:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.12);
    }
    .ledger-block:last-child{border-bottom:0}
    .ledger-block label{color:#a89f93;font-size:8px;letter-spacing:.22em}
    .ledger-block strong{margin:9px 0;color:var(--cream);font:400 clamp(27px,2.6vw,43px) var(--serif)}
    .ledger-block p{margin:0;color:#aaa195;font-size:10px;line-height:1.6}
    .wax-mark{
      width:50px;height:50px;border-radius:50%;
      display:grid;place-items:center;
      color:#f2d6a2;background:radial-gradient(circle at 35% 28%,#c97668,#8f413b 68%);
      box-shadow:0 9px 24px rgba(83,37,32,.36),inset 0 0 0 5px rgba(255,255,255,.09);
      font:italic 18px var(--serif);
      transform:rotate(-8deg);
    }

    /* Time */
    .time-page{
      background:
        linear-gradient(105deg,rgba(18,18,16,.9),rgba(25,23,19,.55)),
        url("data:image/webp;base64,
